reason: Two DLI OCR sources available. Sutra text partially extracted (247 numbered sutras in primary source, 3611 Devanagari lines in commentary). OCR quality is mixed. Expected ~370 sutras across 10 adhyayas.

sources.title: Vaisheshika Sutra Vritti (Jayanarayana)
sources.note: Commentary by Jayanarayana (Tarkapanchanana), includes original sutras
